description.overview: With their lamb-like appearance, Bedlingtons are deceptively gentle-looking but retain true terrier spirit. They're loyal, charming companions.
description.history: The Bedlington Terrier originated in England.
description.temperament: Known for being loyal, charming, spirited.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their crisp, curly, linty coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: With their lamb-like appearance, Bedlingtons are deceptively gentle-looking but retain true terrier spirit. They're loyal, charming companions.
